_meta.title: LPLM §10 Worked Example — Interoperability Profile
_meta.scenario: Japanese Tier-2 precision machining supplier (Yamamoto Seiki Co., Ltd.) connecting to a German OEM's Catena-X BOM-as-built data space
_meta.purpose: Demonstrates the AS-IS → LPLM Standard → TO-BE mapping methodology with quantitative KPI assessment

step1_as_is_profile._description: Step 1: AS-IS Profile — The supplier's current data model as extracted from their production management system (Excel + Access DB). Field names are in Japanese; units are non-standard; IDs are local sequential numbers.

function_models.name: 部品表管理 (BOM Management)
function_models.description: Manages parent-child relationships of manufactured and procured parts

function_models.name: 生産実績管理 (Production Results Management)
function_models.description: Records actual production quantities, dates, and lot information

information_models.name: 品番マスタ (Parts Master)
information_models.description: Master data for all parts managed by the supplier

information_models.name: ロット実績 (Lot Record)
information_models.description: Production lot records with traceability information

data_models.name: T_品番マスタ (t_hinban_master)
data_models.description: Access DB table: parts master with Japanese field names

data_models.name: T_ロット実績 (t_lot_jisseki)
data_models.description: Access DB table: lot-level production results

data_attributes.name: 生産日
data_attributes.description: Production date (YYYY/MM/DD format, stored as text)

step2_to_be_profile._description: Step 2: TO-BE Profile — Catena-X BOM-as-built Aspect Model (v3.0.0) expressed in the LPLM §10 framework. This represents the target data model required by the German OEM.

information_models.name: SingleLevelBomAsBuilt
information_models.description: Catena-X Aspect Model: single-level BOM representing one manufacturing step

data_models.name: SingleLevelBomAsBuilt (SAMM)
data_models.description: Catena-X SAMM Aspect Model for BOM-as-built

step3_mappings._description: Step 3: Model Mapping (AS-IS → LPLM Standard → TO-BE) and Element Mapping at attribute level

model_mappings.note: AS-IS parts master maps to LPLM ProductionItem, which maps to Catena-X BOM-as-built parent entity
AS-IS parent-child relationship (親品番→品番) maps to LPLM ItemConfiguration, then to Catena-X childParts[]
AS-IS lot record maps to LPLM ProductionResult but has no direct counterpart in BOM-as-built (production data, not BOM structure)

element_mappings.note: 品番 (YS-A1234) → catenaXId (urn:uuid:...) — requires ID translation registry
親品番 → childParts[].childCatenaXId — same ID translation needed
員数 → quantity.value — direct numeric mapping
単位 ('個') → unit ('PCE') — requires UNECE Rec 20 code mapping table
createdOn — no direct AS-IS source; derivable from 生産日 with format conversion (YYYY/MM/DD → ISO 8601)
businessPartner (BPNL) — not in AS-IS; must be assigned via Catena-X onboarding
hasAlternatives — not in AS-IS; default to false, requires business process decision

step4_data_logic._description: Step 4: DataLink and DataCalculation — defines JOIN conditions and derived value computation

data_links.note: Join lot records to parts master to obtain material spec and unit weight
Cross-system link via ID translation registry

data_calculations.note: Convert Japanese date format YYYY/MM/DD to ISO 8601 datetime
Map Japanese unit text to UNECE Recommendation 20 common code: '個'→'PCE', 'kg'→'KGM', 'ｍ'→'MTR'

step5_kpi_assessment._description: Step 5: KPI Assessment — quantitative interoperability scores for Yamamoto Seiki's data profile

assessment.note: Assessment of Yamamoto Seiki's ability to PUSH data to Catena-X BOM-as-built

kpi_breakdown._description: Non-normative breakdown showing how each KPI was calculated

conformity_detail.description: Ratio of AS-IS data models with valid TO-BE mappings
conformity_detail.gap: DM-ASIS-002 (lot record) has no direct TO-BE counterpart in BOM-as-built

sufficiency_detail.description: Ratio of TO-BE attributes deliverable from AS-IS in a single transaction
gaps: DA-TOBE-005 (createdOn): derivable via DataCalculation but not natively present
DA-TOBE-007 (businessPartner): requires Catena-X BPNL onboarding — external dependency
DA-TOBE-008 (hasAlternatives): requires new business process — not in current system

reliability_detail.description: Ratio of deliverable attributes with computable values from source models
issues: DA-TOBE-001 (catenaXId): requires external ID registry — computation depends on registry availability

improvement_roadmap._description: Recommended actions to improve KPI scores

actions.action: Register with Catena-X and obtain BPNL
Deploy ID translation registry (品番 ↔ catenaXId)
actions.kpi_impact: reliability +0.24 (catenaXId and child catenaXId become computable)

actions.action: Add hasAlternatives flag to parts master
Standardise unit codes to UNECE Rec 20

projected_kpi_after_actions.note: Conformity remains at 0.67 because lot record (DM-ASIS-002) genuinely has no BOM-as-built counterpart — this is expected and acceptable
